channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: can1357 /oh-my-pi | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

item.title: Fincept-Corporation /FinceptTerminal | Python | N/A
item.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

item.title: trimstray /the-book-of-secret-knowledge | N/A | N/A
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: odoo /odoo | Python | N/A
item.description: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.

item.title: Lum1104 /Understand-Anything | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

item.title: dotnet /skills | C# | N/A
item.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: anthropics /claude-plugins-official | Python | N/A
item.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.
